Chloroblast  

Description

1: Increase Hitpoints by 444. Max: 1044

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 331 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 3.75 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 200
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Deletable: Yes Blockable: Yes
Focusable: Yes Dispellable: Yes
Interruptable: Yes Target Type: Single
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: You are blasted with chlorophyll.
Cast on other: Soandso is blasted with chlorophyll.

Game Description

Mends severe wounds, healing between 444 and @1 hit points.

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Chloroblast

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Chloroblast
ClassLevel
SHM55
DRU55
BST59
RNG62
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (18)
  • Sold By (15)
  • Screenshots

Bought this spell from Srendon Gladetender in the druid guild today on Fippy Darkpaw server.

▲ Page top
cheap spell
QuoteReply
# May 13 2006 at 11:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592288555018
Scholar
21 posts
i just bought this in the bazaar for 6 plat, im thinkin maybe vendor thought it was choloplast? hmm owell who cares woohoo
▲ Page top
increase in healing
QuoteReply
# May 15 2005 at 2:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591797336814
2 posts
Has any1 else notice the change in this spell? This spell used to be 440HP or so for 125mana. Now it's 1068HP for 331mana. Kept the same HP/Mana ratio nearly, just made it a much better alternative to nature's infusion. I have a silverine waistcoat and Healing adept 3, and the planar healing adept for bonus 13% plus boon of the pious from waistcoat. This lets me heal for 1380 was best heal.

cast time went up to 3.8 from 3.1 but it is well worth it. Before I would cast only on INT casters who were not under attack but under 80%. Now I can actually cast on melees in place of other spells depending on situation.
Thank god Sony finally did something right!
▲ Page top
RE: increase in healing
QuoteReply
# Nov 27 2005 at 7:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591863751171
877 posts
Ah, thanks for the information! I thought this happened, but.. well, I quit EQ for a long while, and wasn't sure if I was just remembering poorly or if it was truly different.

On another note, I'm lvl 65, and I still use this spell along with Karana's for the tanks.
▲ Page top
upgraded
QuoteReply
# Apr 12 2005 at 8:01 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1623025339985
Scholar
70 posts
Spell for rangers was increased up to 436, a slight (very) improvement.

# Jul 14 2004 at 9:28 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592264671852
42 posts
>> Heal me... Heal me quick.. got to love this spell as a secondary heal spell <<

actually, this is the overall best heal spell up to lvl 58, making it my primary heal. (L55)

Chloroblast
-----------
HP/mana : 2.44
HP/second : 142.6

Superior Healing
----------------
HP/mana : 2.33
HP/second : 129.55

(based on max. values)

Just to prevent any misunderstanding reading post below.

The spell sells for about 117pp with 125 cha..... so make sure you bring money with you.
Also sells Nature's Touch for 167pp. Just thought you all would liked to have known the prices so you wouldn't have to run back to the bank when you found out the price, like I did :(
